texto: Every kid has a toy that they believe is their best friend, that they believe communicates with them, and they imagine it being alive, their toy horse or car or whatever it is. Stop-motion is the only medium where we literally can make a toy come to life, an actual object.
explicacao: Citação de Henry Selick sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Every kid has a toy that they believe is their best friend, that they believe communicates with t…” articula vida, car, best-friend em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e car.

texto: I'm looking at some comedic horror films because I have often been accused of being too dark. I'm not dark, not compared with 'Saw' or anything like that. So I'm looking at live-action horror films, but not slasher ones - ones that have humor and maybe some social satire.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Henry Selick: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I'm looking at some comedic horror films because I have often been accused of being too dark. I'm…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, dark, looking pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e looking.

frase_original: I'm looking at some comedic horror films because I have often been accused of being too dark. I'm not dark, not compared with 'Saw' or anything like that. So I'm looking at live-action horror films, but not slasher ones - ones that have humor and maybe some social satire.

texto: Cyclops, that's like this primal fear. I had dreams for years that the Cyclops was a small creature living in our huge fish tank at home, and at night, it was going to grow to full size and come after me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Henry Selick: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de enfrentar incertezas com ação. O trecho “Cyclops, that's like this primal fear. I had dreams for years that the Cyclops was a small creatu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, home, fear pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
